hero_subtitle: Bridging the gap between traditional IT infrastructure and modern Artificial Intelligence.
about_text:
Forward-thinking IT Operations Specialist and Automation Engineer with a proven track record of delivering white-glove executive support and managing massive enterprise hardware lifecycles.

I possess a personal passion for understanding how society's digital systems operate, their properties, and how they may better function. I uniquely bridge the gap between traditional IT infrastructure and modern Artificial Intelligence by engineering local LLM pipelines, autonomous diagnostic tools, and background automation macros. I leverage edge AI and system-level scripting to eliminate manual bottlenecks, driving operational efficiency and drastically reducing mean time to resolution across the enterprise.

experience.title: IT Operations & Asset Management Specialist
items: Managed IT operations and full hardware lifecycle for 3,000+ users, including weekly provisioning of 100+ new systems.
Served as the primary escalation point for C-suite executives and senior leadership, resolving complex infrastructure issues with priority SLA response.
Administered user records and access controls in ServiceNow, conducting quarterly audits to enforce data integrity and compliance with corporate security policies.

experience.title: Information Technology Systems Consultant
items: Delivered on-demand, "white-glove" technical support to executive leadership and trading floor operations, maintaining uptime for business-critical financial systems.
Partnered with product and infrastructure teams to deploy and maintain virtual desktops (Citrix VDI), VoIP systems, and proprietary financial trading terminals.
Analyzed ticket trends to identify recurring failure patterns, then redesigned ServiceNow categorization and routing workflows to reduce mean resolution time.

experience.title: Information Technology Consultant
items: Provided rapid-deployment IT services and technical consultation for various corporate clients.

Deployed, tested, and maintained client computer assets; provided expert consultation for IT infrastructure issues, resolving over 50 break-fix incidents monthly and managing 200+ move-add-change requests with a 98% satisfaction rate.
